query: I need to audit the auth module, refactor the payment service, and update the README — can you tackle all three at once?
spin up agents to investigate the db connection leak in /api/users AND the memory spike in /workers/queue.js — they're totally unrelated
we have 4 microservices that need dependency upgrades, none of them share code. fastest way to do this?
run the security scan on billing-service and the perf profiling on search-service in parallel pls
need to write unit tests for src/parsers/ AND scrape the competitor API docs AND grep for all TODO comments — no deps between any of these
executing-plans flagged 3 parallelizable tasks in wave 2, how do i dispatch them concurrently?
two independent features: dark mode toggle and csv export. can we work both simultaneously so i dont have to wait?
investigate why staging differs from prod: one agent checks env vars, another checks db migrations, another checks nginx config — go
i have 6 unrelated repos that all need the same linting fixes applied, can agents do them simultaneously
research the tradeoffs of redis vs memcached AND benchmark our current cache hit rate AND check if competitors use edge caching — all independent
ok i have a plan doc at PLAN.md with 8 tasks, lets start executing it step by step
first migrate the schema, then update the ORM models, then fix the endpoints that break — walk me through each in order
i want to add a new feature to the checkout flow, help me think through the design before we write any code
run the full test suite, and if it passes, deploy to staging, and if that works, cut the release branch
i need to implement the oauth flow — there are like 5 steps that all depend on each other, help me not miss anything
these two tasks look independent but they both write to config.json — is it safe to run them at the same time?
write characterization tests for the legacy payment module before i start refactoring it
generate a changelog from the last 3 sprints and also write the migration guide — both need the same git history context
we're mid-plan on the auth rewrite, i just finished the token validation step, do the findings change anything about the remaining steps?
brainstorm how to parallelize our CI pipeline — it's taking 40min and blocking deploys
